mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_ledger WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(points_balance, 0) FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_ledger (user_id, points, balance_after, action, reference_type, reference_id, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{points}, #{balanceAfter}, #{action}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET points_balance = #{balance} WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.full_name AS fullName, u.username, COALESCE(u.points_balance, 0) AS points, COUNT(CASE WHEN pl.action = 'ORDER_COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) AS completionCount, MIN(CASE WHEN pl.action = 'ORDER_COMPLETED' THEN pl.created_at END) AS earliestCompletion FROM users u LEFT JOIN points_ledger pl ON u.id = pl.user_id GROUP BY u.id, u.full_name, u.username, u.points_balance ORDER BY points DESC, completionCount DESC, earliestCompletion ASC LIMIT 50
